name: RealPage Exchange API
description: The RealPage Exchange (RPX) API enables integration with RealPage's property management platform. The API provides access to resident management, lease tracking, property operations, and financial data. Access requires an active RealPage partner agreement through the RPX AppPartner Program. The API supports both REST and SOAP interfaces; this specification covers the REST API endpoints.
